description:
GIVEN the user is watching VOD/SVOD content
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user pauses the video
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Pause, <current_time> of <total_time>, press select to play.”

For example: "Pause, 1 minute 30 seconds of 5 minutes 45 seconds, press select to play"
